features.title: 共享 mark-to-market current-weight 助手 + execution get_position_diff 改市价（核心可交易 diff）+ recommendations 展示 current_weight
features.acceptance: 【2026-06-07 用户已批：execution diff 改 mark-to-market + rec 展示，见 spec §2。Explore 发现可交易 diff 在 execution 且用成本价】(1) **共享 mark-to-market 助手**：抽取/复用 home.py(B037) 模式——current_weight[symbol]=(shares × latest_close)/NAV，NAV=cash+Σ(shares × latest_close)（market-value，分子分母一致市价）；输入 latest AccountSnapshot positions + PriceProvider.get_marks（price_snapshot 最新收盘）+ Account cash。边界：无 snapshot→0.0；某 symbol 无 mark→degrade 标注不崩（home.py 语义）；NAV=0→0.0 防除零；target 有未持仓→0.0。(2) **execution get_position_diff() 改 mark-to-market（核心）** services/execution.py：reference_price 从 snapshot.avg_cost → PriceProvider 最新收盘市价；total_equity → market-value NAV；delta_weight=target-current(market)；**保留 avg_cost 供 wash-sale/cost-basis（不删字段不改记账，仅权重/diff 估值改市价）**；ticket 生成(tickets.py generate_ticket 读 get_position_diff)自动得 mark-to-market diff，无需改 ticket 渲染；无 mark 持仓→diff 行 degrade 标注不静默当 0。(3) **recommendations 展示 current_weight** services/recommendations.py _build_target_positions：current_weight 从硬编码 0.0 → 复用 (1) 助手真实值；diff=target-current 与 execution 同基准。(4) pytest ≥10：助手（已知持仓+价格→已知 weight；无 mark/无 snapshot/NAV=0 边界）；execution diff market vs 旧 avg_cost（已知场景 delta 变化）；recommendations current_weight 真实；**B023 工作流回归（ticket→fills→reconcile 不破，wash-sale 仍用 avg_cost）**。(5) Gates：backend pytest ≥ baseline+≥10 / ruff 0 / mypy 0 / §12.10.2 守门不破 / 前端不动。(6) 不动：master 评分/B044/B045 precompute/前端 Rec UI/avg_cost 记账/wash-sale/regime（F002）。
design_decisions: 交易 diff 范围（2026-06-07 用户批）：execution diff 改 mark-to-market（ticket 真正可交易 diff）+ rec 展示 current_weight 一致。
NAV/估值基准（planner 决）：mark-to-market（持仓 × 最新收盘）一致用于分子分母，复用 home.py，不混成本/市价。
avg_cost 保留（planner 决）：wash-sale/cost-basis 依赖，仅改权重/diff 估值基准不动记账。

features.title: regime reconcile：strategies 注册表对齐 master 实际 4-sleeve + 验下游 home/advisor/news/strategies 不破
features.acceptance: (1) **注册表对齐 master** services/strategies.py 对齐 trade/portfolio/master.py 实际组成：加 global_etf_momentum（momentum 0.40 现缺）+ satellite_hk_china stub（0.10 现缺）条目；B013/B014/B015 regime 孤儿项重标研究态/deactivate（regime_adaptive master planning_weight=0.0 且 _resolve_child_weights weight>0 抛 BacktestError→留研究态，激活属未来 B013）；B016 strategy_id（B016-risk-parity-hrp vs master risk_parity_vol_target）口径对齐/注明。(2) **下游消费者必验不破**：/api/strategies（前端 Strategies 页）/ home.py _registry_sleeves（sleeve breakdown）/ advisor precompute universe / news sleeve_tickers——注册表变更后 regroup，验渲染/分组正确 + 相关测试更新。(3) pytest：注册表对齐（4-sleeve 反映 master，regime 研究态）+ 下游 home sleeve breakdown/advisor/news 不破。(4) Gates：backend pytest ≥ baseline+ / ruff 0 / mypy 0 / 前端 Strategies 页不破（如有 vitest 更新）。(5) 不动：master 评分逻辑 / regime 激活（留 B013）/ F001 diff 逻辑。
design_decisions: regime reconcile（2026-06-07 用户批纳入 B046）：注册表对齐 master 实际 4-sleeve，regime 留研究态不激活；验下游 home/advisor/news/strategies 不破。

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收（ticket diff mark-to-market 准确 + rec current_weight 真实 + 注册表对齐 + B023 工作流不破）+ signoff
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内)：F001+F002 全 generator 验收脚本跑通 — backend pytest ≥ baseline+≥10 / ruff / mypy；**B023 工作流回归测试绿**（ticket→fills→reconcile 不破，wash-sale 仍 avg_cost）；§12.10.2 请求路径禁 trade 守门不破；下游 home/advisor/news/strategies 测试绿；artifact grep secret 泄漏=0。L2 (真 VM)：(1) curl /api/health 200 + SHA≡main HEAD（v0.9.25）；(2) /api/debug/recent-errors={count:0,records:[]}；(3) **ticket diff mark-to-market**：手动 PUT 一段含浮盈持仓 → GET /api/execution/position-diff 的 current_weight 按市价（非成本价 avg_cost）+ ticket 买卖 delta 准确；**记录市价 vs 成本价口径差异**（证明已改 mark-to-market）；(4) **GET /api/recommendations/current current_weight 真实**（非 0.0，与 execution 同基准）+ anon 401；(5) **/api/strategies 反映 master 实际 4-sleeve**（momentum/risk_parity/us_quality/hk_china；regime 研究态）+ home sleeve breakdown/advisor/news 不破；(6) Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD；(7) B026 banner 仍 absent。Signoff: docs/test-reports/B046-tradeable-diff-current-weight-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md（§Production/HEAD + §Post-signoff Deploy + **§交易 diff mark-to-market vs cost-basis 对比记录**）。Framework 候选：mark-to-market vs cost-basis 双估值口径若出新通用规律记 §Framework Learnings。更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback。
